Adds Unraid's native notification system as a notification channel. Thanks to **@manilx** for the suggestion.

## Added
- **Unraid notifications.** A new option in Settings → Notifications sends each backup result to Unraid's own notification system — which you can then forward to Pushover, email, Discord, etc. from Unraid itself, no per-service setup in BombVault. It honours the same policy as the other channels (never / on failure / always); a successful backup shows as a normal notice, a failed one as a warning. The **Test** button covers it too.
  - It's delivered over the same host SSH connection BombVault uses for VM backups (it runs Unraid's `notify` script on the host), so it needs the SSH connection set up (Settings → VM Backup over SSH). Without it the channel is simply skipped, and Test tells you.

## Note
- On restore, file/folder **permissions and ownership are preserved** — restic stores each item's mode, uid/gid, timestamps, ACLs and extended attributes and restores them, so appdata that needs specific permissions comes back exactly as it was. (Answering a common question; no change needed.)

Image: `ghcr.io/junkerderprovinz/bombvault:2.1.0` (also `:2`, `:2.1`, `:latest`), multi-arch (amd64 + arm64).
